aliases: Our Men Establish the Greatest Association
description: Omega is a Singaporean prison gang turned organized crime group, founded in 1989 in Chia Keng Prison by Yan Bai. It is a monoethnic Malay Muslim secret society formed to protect Malay inmates from discrimination by Chinese-dominated gangs. The group evolved into a criminal enterprise involved in drug trafficking and other illegal activities, with networks extending beyond Singapore.

country_links.evidence_quote: it became heavily involved in the drug distribution trade from 1996 to the late 2000s, both within and across Singapore's borders into Malaysia.
country_links.context: Omega was involved in drug distribution across Singapore's borders into Malaysia.
